# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Discarded: this source should not enter the institute as a serious research artifact candidate.

## Why

The captured source is a survey of LLM-based code generation agents. Its abstract and excerpt describe taxonomy, applications, benchmarks, metrics, tools, and future directions, but they do not show a concrete experimental result, benchmark dataset, incident record, production telemetry, or field report that would make the source itself an evidence-bearing institute candidate. It appears primarily synthetic and derivative rather than a source with a direct empirical payload.

## Limits
